form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Maggie Moth at Young over 1720m in a 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Soho Betty Dee at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $8.50. Expected to go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Maggie Moth at Young over 1720m in a 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Soho Betty Dee at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $8.50. Expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m checked because of Harveys Tooth breaking stride.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after only six days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 6th (Fr3) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 23 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $81. Must do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here second-up after only six days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 6th (Fr3) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 23 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $81. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the final 400m to finish in tenth and last position beaten 71.4m.
Three wide early before finding a position outside the leader at the 1200m.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 6th-8.2 beaten 3.5 m by Ideal Andy (2:00.70) in 2 WINs on April 6 at $15. At the start before was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2260m at Bathurst was 7th-13.5 at the bell, beaten 10 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $101. Capable of a better showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 6th-8.2 beaten 3.5 m by Ideal Andy (2:00.70) in 2 WINs on April 6 at $15. At the start before was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2260m at Bathurst was 7th-13.5 at the bell, beaten 10 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $101. Capable of a better showing.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr3) over 1720m at this track beaten 30 m by Savage Storm (2:07.00) in NR up to 52 M on February 20 at $21. Before that 4th (Fr3) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 5th-9.1 beaten 14 m by Time To Torque (2:04.20) in NR up to 52 on February 3 at $51. Can make an immediate impact for the new yard.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr3) over 1720m at this track beaten 30 m by Savage Storm (2:07.00) in NR up to 52 M on February 20 at $21. Before that 4th (Fr3) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 5th-9.1 beaten 14 m by Time To Torque (2:04.20) in NR up to 52 on February 3 at $51. Can make an immediate impact for the new yard.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running and was not fully tested.
Hung out shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr4) over 2040m after showing early speed at Parkes, beaten 7 m by Krista Bellita (2:33.20) in 2 WINs on April 4 at $3.80. Top chance in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr4) over 2040m after showing early speed at Parkes, beaten 7 m by Krista Bellita (2:33.20) in 2 WINs on April 4 at $3.80. Top chance in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced after the start when Krista Bellita galloped.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Go Easy On Me at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $26. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Memphis Fury at Parkes over 1660m in a NR up to 52 on April 4 at $9. Expected to be in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Go Easy On Me at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $26. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Memphis Fury at Parkes over 1660m in a NR up to 52 on April 4 at $9. Expected to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and paced roughly passing the 500m when Roll To The Top shifted out.
Restrained at the start to a rearward position.
Unable to secure clear running over the concluding stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start by 3.5 m as favourite (Sr3) at Parkes (2:03.50) beating Marabelle in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $2.90. In form and may prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 3.5 m as favourite (Sr3) at Parkes (2:03.50) beating Marabelle in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $2.90. In form and may prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped out as the start was affected.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst well beaten by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $61. Before that, 8th (Fr6) over 2040m after showing early speed at Parkes beaten 50 m by Valdezz (2:32.90) in 2 WINs on March 6 at $13. Among the exotic chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst well beaten by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $61. Before that, 8th (Fr6) over 2040m after showing early speed at Parkes beaten 50 m by Valdezz (2:32.90) in 2 WINs on March 6 at $13. Among the exotic chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten in excess of 100m.
Had a tendency to over race throughout the event.
Broke stride in the early stages of the score up.
